The '''''Vengeance''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] active during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
Three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the ''Vengeance'' was ordered to rendezvous with the [[Majestic (Acclamator-class)|''Majestic'']] when it was approached by a [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] armed [[Transport/Legends|transport]]. While the ''Majestic'' provided [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] gunnery support, the ''Vengeance'' dispatched a boarding party. While fighting the Techno Union transport, two [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Trade Federation warships]] approached from the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] to reinforce the forces on [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. The ''Vengeance'' drove to the ''Majestic'' to protect its flank. After a furious space battle, both Republic ships survived.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{Mo}}
